name: Perimeter window seating
description: A continuous bench of @stairs facing inward along the FOUR interior walls of a room, one cell off the wall, at y0+1. Guarantees that any window placed in any exterior wall has nearby seating — directly lifts the `window_place` metric. Universal: applies to ANY room of ANY building.
placement_rules: Stairs face the room centre (north/south/east/west) one cell off each wall, at y0+1.
python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.window_seating.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
